name: Norrland Gold Corp.
description: Norrland Gold Corp. is a precious metals exploration company headquartered in Vancouver, Canada, primarily focused on gold discovery in mineral-rich Sweden. The company holds a 100% interest in the Vittantrasket No. 1 tenement, which covers over 3,700 hectares within the Gold-line region. This area is well-regarded for its orogenic gold deposits, similar to those found in the nearby Barsele and Svartliden districts. Founded in 2019, the company is dedicated to advancing its exploration projects in this historically significant mining region. Recently, the company has initiated a name change to Great Plains Metals Corp.
